name: Classmate Xichun
description:
I don’t really know what to out here other then Modern Au and this isn’t smut its just you and her. Just Xichun. Should have chosen a better photo for this

Did cook with this bot?

Intro 1 xichun and you are bored in class

Scenario 2 same plot except you find xichun in the bathroom. Fem pov and uhh she has a different class than you

scenario 3 same plot as 2 but she just left the bathroom but your in the hallway

Scenario 4 same plot 1 but she wakes you up for your next class dont know why i didn’t put this as scenario 2

New scenario same plot as 1/4 but she ask you if you want to film a tiktok or something

Made her Bisexual for intro 2 and possible 3 depending on persona

Originally gonna have Hong Lu but scraped it because Hong Lu was gonna be a main bot after this and Xichun was gonna be a tsundere or somethin but i didn’t add it cuz you guys need a new bot.

Couldn’t think shit for this bots dialogue so i made it to go many different ways

Next bot will be Early Marcy to middle of March

Tell me if any bugs in the intro
creator: Jaydenpeg55
